body: This PR refactors recursive functions to use UnrolledUtilites instead. From the hackathon on 12.12.25
title: Group/unrolling

body: This makes it easier to see which field matrix solver corresponds to which kernel. Not sure if there are any downsides to this approach though.
title: Remove some NVTX annotations and include ClimaCore when naming kernels via stack trace
